_comment: Synthetic feed entries for the news matcher suite. Deterministic, offline. The 'acceptance' entry is the Feb 11 2026 S.1383 218-213 maneuver.

acceptance.summary: The provision was added as an amendment to S. 1383 and passed 218-213.
